summary: Application Engineer with 6+ years of experience building and modernizing scalable enterprise systems, currently contributing to fintech platforms supporting 25M+ users in Japan. Strong in Java (Spring Boot, MicroProfile), microservices, and API architecture, with full-stack experience in Angular and Vue/Nuxt. Hands-on in hybrid cloud transformation, Kubernetes, and CI/CD automation, with a focus on clean architecture and resilient, high-performance systems. Oracle Certified Java SE 11 Developer. Fluent in English and French, Arabic (native), with basic Japanese.

education.university: ESPRIT (Private Higher School of Engineering and Technology), Tunis, Tunisia
ISIMM (Higher Institute of Computer Science and Mathematics), Monastir, Tunisia

bullets: Member of the Technology Incubation Team, contributing to architecture design, modernization, and cloud transformation of Rakuten Card core systems.
Design, develop, and maintain backend services for large-scale card payment and credit management platforms.
Develop private and public APIs for secure, efficient integration across internal and customer-facing applications.
Contribute to modernization initiatives across legacy and new systems, including transition from Java-based applications to modern JavaScript/SSR-based architectures.
Contribute to a hybrid cloud migration program from on-premise to Google Cloud Platform (GCP), including cloud-native refactoring, CI/CD implementation, and containerized deployment strategies.
Conduct code reviews, promote engineering best practices, and collaborate closely with Product Owners and cross-functional teams.

Built automated workflows using ActiveMQ for bulk processing, increasing efficiency by 40%.
